/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o VST3/Release/WestCoastDrumSynth.vst3/Contents/MacOS/WestCoastDrumSynth CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/WestCoastProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/WestCoastController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/engine/DrumVoice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/engine/StepSequencer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/source/presets/FactoryPresets.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/WestCoastDrumSynth.dir/_deps/vst3sdk-src/public.sdk/source/main/macmain.cpp.o"  -framework CoreFoundation lib/Release/libsdk.a lib/Release/libvstgui_support.a lib/Release/libsdk_common.a lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a lib/Release/libbase.a lib/Release/libvstgui.a -framework Cocoa -framework QuartzCore -framework Accelerate -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework OpenGL lib/Release/libvstgui_uidescription.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libexpat.tbd
